summary: The downstream patch only adds semicolons to early return expressions in Chain methods. This is Rust formatting noise and does not alter execution outcome selection, append-chain error behavior, chain split semantics, block state, trie data, hashing, encoding, or tests.

No behavior-bearing atoms were emitted because the modified tokens do not affect branch conditions, error paths, state transitions, execution semantics, trie/state-root behavior, encoding, hashing, or fixtures.
